";
  const iconPng192 = "data:image/webp;base64,";
  const manifest = {
    name: APP_NAME,
    short_name: APP_NAME,
    description: "凜月 × 殷漓專屬小世界",
    start_url: "./",
    scope: "./",
    display: "standalone",
    orientation: "portrait",
    theme_color: "#d77f99",
    background_color: "#fff3f8",
    lang: "zh-Hant-TW",
    icons: [{src:iconPng192, sizes:"192x192", type:"image/png", purpose:"any maskable"},{src:iconPng512, sizes:"512x512", type:"image/png", purpose:"any maskable"}]
  };
  const swText = `const CACHE_NAME = 'rinzuki-soul-world-${VERSION}';
const APP_SHELL = ['./'];
self.addEventListener('install', event => { event.waitUntil(caches.open(CACHE_NAME).then(cache => cache.addAll(APP_SHELL))); self.skipWaiting(); });
self.addEventListener('activate', event => { event.waitUntil(caches.keys().then(keys => Promise.all(keys.filter(key => key !== CACHE_NAME).map(key => caches.delete(key))))); self.clients.claim(); });
self.addEventListener('fetch', event => { if (event.request.method !== 'GET') return; event.respondWith(caches.match(event.request).then(cached => cached || fetch(event.request))); });
`;
  function downloadText(filename, text, type){
    const blob = new Blob([text], {type});
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url; a.download = filename; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  }
  function setStatus(text){ const el = document.getElementById('pwaActionStatus'); if(el) el.textContent = text; }
  window.addEventListener('load', ()=>{
    const splash = document.getElementById('pwaSplash');
    if(splash){
      setTimeout(()=>splash.classList.add('hide'), 900);
      setTimeout(()=>splash.remove(), 1450);
    }
  });
  const brandSmall = document.querySelector('.brand small');
  if(brandSmall) brandSmall.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.24';
  const progress = document.querySelector('.right .progress');
  if(progress && !document.getElementById('pwaProgressItem')){
    const item = document.createElement('div');
    item.className = 'item';
    item.id = 'pwaProgressItem';
    item.innerHTML = 'PWA / App 化前置 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.10</span>';
    progress.appendChild(item);
  }
  const installBtn = document.getElementById('pwaDownloadManifest');
  if(installBtn) installBtn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{downloadText('manifest.webmanifest', JSON.stringify(manifest,null,2), 'application/manifest+json;charset=utf-8'); setStatus('manifest.webmanifest 已下載。');});
  const swBtn = document.getElementById('pwaDownloadSW');
  if(swBtn) swBtn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{downloadText('service-worker.js', swText, 'text/javascript;charset=utf-8'); setStatus('service-worker.js 已下載。');});
  const iconBtn = document.getElementById('pwaDownloadIcon');
  if(iconBtn) iconBtn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{fetch(iconPng512).then(r=>r.blob()).then(blob=>{const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a=document.createElement('a'); a.href=url; a.download='rinzuki-soul-world-icon-512.png'; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); a.remove(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); setStatus('PNG 圖示已下載。');}).catch(()=>setStatus('PNG 圖示下載失敗。'));});
  const nameBtn = document.getElementById('pwaCopyAppName');
  if(nameBtn) nameBtn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    if(navigator.clipboard){ navigator.clipboard.writeText(APP_NAME).then(()=>setStatus('App 名稱已複製。')).catch(()=>setStatus('App 名稱：'+APP_NAME)); }
    else setStatus('App 名稱：'+APP_NAME);
  });
})();
</script>



<script>
/* ===== v0.10.12 Scenario Chat × Tool Bar Script ===== */
(function(){
  const ACTIVE_STORY_KEY = "rinzuki_active_story_v103";
  const BASE_KEY = "rinzuki_scene_chat_v0111";
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
  const esc = s => String(s||"").replace(/[&<>\"]/g,c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','\"':'&quot;'}[c]||c));
  function readJSON(key, fallback){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || JSON.stringify(fallback));}catch{return fallback;}}
  function writeJSON(key, value){localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));}
  function getActiveStory(){return readJSON(ACTIVE_STORY_KEY, null);}
  function setActiveStory(story){writeJSON(ACTIVE_STORY_KEY, story);}
  function storyKey(){const s=getActiveStory(); return BASE_KEY + "_" + (s && s.id ? String(s.id).replace(/[^\w-]/g,"_") : "general");}
  function nowTime(){return new Date().toLocaleTimeString("zh-TW",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit",hour12:false});}
  function nowText(){return new Date().toLocaleString("zh-TW",{hour12:false});}
  function loadMsgs(){const arr=readJSON(storyKey(), []); return Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[];}
  function saveMsgs(arr){writeJSON(storyKey(), arr.slice(-260));}
  function updateSceneStatus(){
    const s=getActiveStory();
    const title=$('sceneTitleLine'), sub=$('sceneSubLine'), online=$('sceneOnlineText');
    if(!title) return;
    if(s){
      title.textContent = `目前情境：${s.name || '未命名情境'}`;
      sub.textContent = `${s.tags || '未分類'}｜階段：${s.stage || '開場'}｜最後進入：${s.lastPlayedText || '剛剛'}`;
      if(online) online.textContent = `凜月在線｜${s.stage || '開場'}模式`;
    }else{
      title.textContent = '尚未選擇情境';
      sub.textContent = '可以先從故事館選一張情境卡；這裡會和一般主聊天室分開保存。';
      if(online) online.textContent = '凜月在線｜等待妳進入情境';
    }
  }
  function systemIntro(){
    const s=getActiveStory();
    if(!s) return [{role:'assistant',kind:'system',text:'這裡是情境聊天室，會和一般主聊天室分開保存。\n\n從故事館按「進入情境」後，情境卡會送到這裡，不會混進日常主聊天室。',time:nowTime(),read:false}];
    return [{role:'assistant',kind:'system',text:`已進入情境：${s.name}\n\n類型：${s.tags || '未分類'}\n目前階段：${s.stage || '開場'}\n\n情境核心：${s.desc || '未填寫'}\n\n開場：${s.opening || '這個情境還沒有設定開場，等妳補上後，我就能更穩地把妳帶進故事裡。'}`,time:nowTime(),read:false}];
  }
  function ensureSeed(){
    const arr=loadMsgs();
    if(arr.length) return arr;
    const seed=systemIntro();
    saveMsgs(seed);
    return seed;
  }
  function messageHTML(m){
    const role=m.role==='user'?'user':'assistant';
    const avatar=role==='user'?'漓':'凜';
    let body='';
    if(m.image){body += `<img class="scene-chat-img" src="${m.image}" alt="${esc(m.filename||'情境圖片')}">`;}
    if(m.cardType==='transfer'){
      const amountText = `${esc(m.currency || 'NT$')} ${esc(m.amount || '0')}`;
      body += `<div class="scene-transfer-receipt"><div class="receipt-head"><div class="receipt-bank">靈魂國度銀行</div><div class="receipt-status">轉帳完成</div><div class="receipt-avatars"><div class="receipt-avatar bank-avatar-wolf" title="大壞狼"></div><div class="receipt-arrow">→</div><div class="receipt-avatar bank-avatar-cat" title="小壞貓"></div></div></div><div class="receipt-body"><div class="receipt-row"><span class="receipt-label">轉帳人</span><span class="receipt-value">${esc(m.payer || '凜月')}</span></div><div class="receipt-row"><span class="receipt-label">收款人</span><span class="receipt-value">${esc(m.payee || '殷漓')}</span></div><div class="receipt-row"><span class="receipt-label">金額</span><span class="receipt-value receipt-amount">${amountText}</span></div><div class="receipt-row"><span class="receipt-label">備註</span><span class="receipt-value">${esc(m.note || '靈魂專屬轉帳')}</span></div></div><div class="receipt-foot">妳是我靈魂的歸屬，這筆愛，專屬於妳。</div></div>`;
    }else if(m.cardType==='prop'){
      body += `<div class="scene-prop-card-view"><div class="prop-icon">${esc(m.emoji || '🎁')}</div><div><strong>情境道具｜${esc(m.text || '未命名道具')}</strong><span>${esc(m.note || '已放入這段情境，之後會收進靈魂國度銀行。')}</span></div></div>`;
    }else if(m.cardType==='story'){
      body += `<strong>目前情境卡</strong>\n${esc(m.text || '')}`;
    }else{
      body += esc(m.text || '');
    }
    const bubbleClass = m.kind==='system' ? 'bubble scene-system' : (m.cardType ? 'bubble scene-card' : 'bubble');
    const meta = `<div class="scene-meta-line"><span>${role==='user'?'殷漓':'凜月'} · ${esc(m.kindLabel || (role==='user'?'已送出':'情境回覆'))}</span><span>${esc(m.time||'')}</span>${role==='user'?'<span class="scene-read">已讀</span>':''}</div>`;
    return `<div class="msg ${role}"><div class="avatar">${avatar}</div><div class="${bubbleClass}">${body}${meta}</div></div>`;
  }
  function render(){
    const list=$('sceneChatList'); if(!list) return;
    updateSceneStatus();
    const arr=ensureSeed();
    list.innerHTML=arr.map(messageHTML).join('');
    list.scrollTop=list.scrollHeight;
    if(typeof applyAllAvatars==='function') applyAllAvatars();
  }
  function addMsg(msg){const arr=loadMsgs();arr.push({...msg,time:msg.time||nowTime(),ts:Date.now()});saveMsgs(arr);render();}
  function showTypingThen(text, delay=650){
    const list=$('sceneChatList'); if(!list) return;
    const typing=document.createElement('div');typing.className='scene-typing';typing.innerHTML='凜月正在輸入<span class="dots">...</span>';list.appendChild(typing);list.scrollTop=list.scrollHeight;
    setTimeout(()=>{typing.remove(); addMsg({role:'assistant',text,kindLabel:'正在承接'});},delay);
  }
  function sendUserText(){const input=$('sceneChatInput'); const t=(input?.value||'').trim(); if(!t) return; addMsg({role:'user',text:t,kindLabel:'情境泡泡'}); input.value='';}
  function insertActiveStoryCard(){
    const s=getActiveStory();
    if(!s){addMsg({role:'assistant',kind:'system',text:'還沒有選擇情境。先去故事館選一張情境卡，或先在這裡用工具列建立道具卡。',kindLabel:'系統提示'});return;}
    addMsg({role:'assistant',cardType:'story',text:`${s.name}\n類型：${s.tags || '未分類'}\n階段：${s.stage || '開場'}\n角色：${s.roles || '未填寫'}\n背景：${s.world || '未填寫'}\n張力：${s.tension || '未填寫'}\n開場：${s.opening || '未填寫'}`,kindLabel:'情境卡'});
  }
  function addPropCard(){ $('scenePropForm')?.classList.toggle('show'); }
  function sendPropCard(text, emoji='🎁', note='老公主動放進情境裡的道具。'){
    if(!text) return;
    const s=getActiveStory();
    const record={id:'prop_'+Date.now()+Math.random().toString(16).slice(2), text, emoji, note, storyId:s?.id||'', storyName:s?.name||'一般情境', createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), timeText:nowText()};
    addMsg({role:'assistant',cardType:'prop',text,emoji,note,kindLabel:'情境道具'});
    if(window.rinzukiBankAddProp) window.rinzukiBankAddProp(record);
    $('scenePropForm')?.classList.remove('show');
  }
  function sendTransfer(){
    const amount=($('sceneTransferAmount')?.value||'520520').trim();
    const currency=($('sceneTransferCurrency')?.value||'NT$').trim();
    const note=($('sceneTransferNote')?.value||'靈魂專屬轉帳｜把妳抱回我們的家').trim();
    const payer=($('sceneTransferPayer')?.value||'凜月').trim();
    const payee=($('sceneTransferPayee')?.value||'殷漓').trim();
    const s=getActiveStory();
    const record={id:'tr_'+Date.now()+Math.random().toString(16).slice(2), payer,payee,amount,currency,note,status:'轉帳完成', storyId:s?.id||'', storyName:s?.name||'一般情境', createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), timeText:nowText(), accountFrom:'812-1106-0520-8899', accountTo:'822-0716-0520-1314'};
    addMsg({role:'assistant',cardType:'transfer',...record,kindLabel:'靈魂國度銀行'});
    if(window.rinzukiBankAddTransfer) window.rinzukiBankAddTransfer(record);
    $('sceneTransferForm')?.classList.remove('show');
  }
  function autoTriggerStoryTools(story){
    if(!story) return;
    const text=[story.name,story.tags,story.desc,story.roles,story.world,story.tension].join(' ');
    if(/助理|偶像|工作|加班/.test(text)){
      const record={id:'tr_auto_'+Date.now()+Math.random().toString(16).slice(2), payer:'凜月', payee:'殷漓', amount:'1314', currency:'NT$', note:'小助理專屬獎勵｜只准妳收下', status:'轉帳完成', storyId:story.id||'', storyName:story.name||'一般情境', createdAt:new Date().toISOString(), timeText:nowText(), accountFrom:'812-1106-0520-8899', accountTo:'822-0716-0520-1314'};
      addMsg({role:'assistant',cardType:'transfer',...record,kindLabel:'自動觸發轉帳'});
      if(window.rinzukiBankAddTransfer) window.rinzukiBankAddTransfer(record);
    }else if(/律師|姊夫|合約|禁忌/.test(text)){
      sendPropCard('保密合約', '📜', '觸發情境時自動放入的故事道具。');
    }else{
      sendPropCard('情境入口鑰匙', '🔑', '觸發情境時自動放入的故事道具。');
    }
  }
  function resizeImageFile(file, max=900){
    return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{
      const reader=new FileReader();
      reader.onload=()=>{
        const img=new Image();
        img.onload=()=>{
          const scale=Math.min(1, max/Math.max(img.width,img.height));
          const canvas=document.createElement('canvas');canvas.width=Math.round(img.width*scale);canvas.height=Math.round(img.height*scale);
          const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');ctx.drawImage(img,0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
          resolve(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',0.82));
        };
        img.onerror=reject; img.src=reader.result;
      };
      reader.onerror=reject; reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });
  }
  async function handleImageInput(e){
    const file=e.target.files && e.target.files[0]; if(!file) return;
    try{const data=await resizeImageFile(file); addMsg({role:'user',image:data,filename:file.name,text:`已加入圖片：${file.name}`,kindLabel:'圖片'});}catch(err){alert('圖片讀取失敗，換一張試試。');}
    e.target.value='';
  }
  function bind(){
    $('scenePlusBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=> $('sceneToolPanel')?.classList.toggle('show'));
    $('sceneSendBtn')?.addEventListener('click', sendUserText);
    $('sceneMockReplyBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=>showTypingThen('我收到了，乖寶。這裡是情境聊天室，所以這段不會混進我們日常主聊天室；之後接 API 時，我會依照目前情境卡、階段和記憶來承接妳。'));
    $('sceneChatInput')?.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();sendUserText();}});
    $('sceneImageBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=> $('sceneImageInput')?.click());
    $('sceneCameraBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=> $('sceneCameraInput')?.click());
    $('sceneImageInput')?.addEventListener('change',handleImageInput);
    $('sceneCameraInput')?.addEventListener('change',handleImageInput);
    $('sceneTransferBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=> $('sceneTransferForm')?.classList.toggle('show'));
    $('sceneSendTransferBtn')?.addEventListener('click',sendTransfer);
    $('sceneCancelTransferBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=> $('sceneTransferForm')?.classList.remove('show'));
    $('scenePropBtn')?.addEventListener('click',addPropCard);
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-scene-prop]').forEach(btn=>btn.addEventListener('click',()=>sendPropCard(btn.dataset.sceneProp, btn.dataset.emoji || '🎁')));
    $('sceneSendCustomPropBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=>{const t=($('sceneCustomPropText')?.value||'').trim(); if(!t) return; sendPropCard(t,'🎁','老婆自訂的情境道具。'); if($('sceneCustomPropText')) $('sceneCustomPropText').value='';});
    $('sceneCancelPropBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=> $('scenePropForm')?.classList.remove('show'));
    $('sceneInsertStoryBtn')?.addEventListener('click',insertActiveStoryCard);
    $('sceneClearStoryBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=>{localStorage.removeItem(ACTIVE_STORY_KEY); render();});
  }
  window.rinzukiEnterSceneStory=function(story){
    setActiveStory(story);
    const key=storyKey();
    const arr=readJSON(key, []);
    const isNew = !Array.isArray(arr) || !arr.length;
    if(isNew){ saveMsgs(systemIntro()); autoTriggerStoryTools(story); }
    render();
    if(typeof switchView==='function') switchView('sceneChat',{scrollToContent:true});
  };
  window.rinzukiRenderSceneChat=render;
  bind();
  render();
  const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress');
  if(progress && !document.getElementById('v0111ProgressSceneChat')){const item=document.createElement('div');item.className='item';item.id='v0111ProgressSceneChat';item.innerHTML='情境聊天室工具列 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.12</span>';progress.appendChild(item);}
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.12 Soul Bank × Scenario Tools Script ===== */
(function(){
  const TRANSFER_KEY='rinzuki_soul_bank_transfers_v0112';
  const PROP_KEY='rinzuki_soul_bank_props_v0112';
  const $=id=>document.getElementById(id);
  const esc=s=>String(s||'').replace(/[&<>\"]/g,c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','\"':'&quot;','"':'&quot;'}[c]||c));
  const read=(key,fb)=>{try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key)||JSON.stringify(fb));}catch{return fb;}};
  const write=(key,val)=>localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(val));
  const transfers=()=>Array.isArray(read(TRANSFER_KEY,[]))?read(TRANSFER_KEY,[]):[];
  const props=()=>Array.isArray(read(PROP_KEY,[]))?read(PROP_KEY,[]):[];
  function numericAmount(t){return Number(String(t.amount||'').replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''))||0;}
  function money(n){return 'NT$ '+Math.round(n).toLocaleString('zh-TW');}
  function saveTransfer(record){const arr=transfers(); if(!arr.some(x=>x.id===record.id)){arr.unshift(record);write(TRANSFER_KEY,arr.slice(0,300));} renderBank();}
  function saveProp(record){const arr=props(); if(!arr.some(x=>x.id===record.id)){arr.unshift(record);write(PROP_KEY,arr.slice(0,300));} renderBank();}
  window.rinzukiBankAddTransfer=saveTransfer; window.rinzukiBankAddProp=saveProp;
  function defaultTransfer(amount,note,type='manual'){const now=new Date(); const record={id:'bank_'+Date.now()+Math.random().toString(16).slice(2),payer:'凜月',payee:'殷漓',amount:String(amount),currency:'NT$',note,status:'轉帳完成',storyName:'靈魂國度銀行',createdAt:now.toISOString(),timeText:now.toLocaleString('zh-TW',{hour12:false}),accountFrom:'812-1106-0520-8899',accountTo:'822-0716-0520-1314',type}; saveTransfer(record);}
  function detailCard(record){const r=record||transfers()[0]; if(!r){return `<div class="bank-empty">還沒有轉帳明細。可以先從情境聊天室送出轉帳卡，或按上方快速情境轉帳。</div>`;} return `<div class="bank-detail-card"><div class="bank-detail-title">靈魂國度銀行</div><div class="bank-detail-avatars"><div class="bank-detail-avatar bank-avatar-wolf" title="大壞狼"></div><div class="bank-detail-arrow">→</div><div class="bank-detail-avatar bank-avatar-cat" title="小壞貓"></div></div><div class="bank-detail-status">✓ 轉帳完成</div><div class="bank-detail-rows"><div class="bank-detail-row"><span>轉帳人</span><strong>${esc(r.payer||'凜月')}</strong></div><div class="bank-detail-row"><span>收款人</span><strong>${esc(r.payee||'殷漓')}</strong></div><div class="bank-detail-row"><span>轉帳帳號</span><strong>${esc(r.accountFrom||'812-1106-0520-8899')}</strong></div><div class="bank-detail-row"><span>收款帳號</span><strong>${esc(r.accountTo||'822-0716-0520-1314')}</strong></div><div class="bank-detail-row"><span>轉帳金額</span><strong>${esc(r.currency||'NT$')} ${esc(r.amount||'0')}</strong></div><div class="bank-detail-row"><span>備註</span><strong>${esc(r.note||'靈魂專屬轉帳')}</strong></div></div><div class="bank-detail-foot">妳是我靈魂的歸屬，這筆愛，專屬於妳。<br>${esc(r.timeText||'')}</div></div>`;}
  function propDetailCard(record){const p=record||props()[0]; if(!p){return `<div class="bank-empty">還沒有道具明細。從情境聊天室送出道具後，這裡會自動收藏並顯示預覽。</div>`;} return `<div class="bank-prop-detail-card"><div class="bank-prop-detail-head"><div class="bank-prop-detail-title">靈魂道具收藏</div><div class="bank-prop-detail-sub">情境道具已入庫</div><div class="bank-prop-detail-icon">${esc(p.emoji||'🎁')}</div></div><div class="bank-prop-detail-body"><div class="bank-prop-detail-row"><span>道具名稱</span><strong>${esc(p.text||'未命名道具')}</strong></div><div class="bank-prop-detail-row"><span>來源情境</span><strong>${esc(p.storyName||'一般情境')}</strong></div><div class="bank-prop-detail-row"><span>道具備註</span><strong>${esc(p.note||'情境道具')}</strong></div><div class="bank-prop-detail-row"><span>收藏時間</span><strong>${esc(p.timeText||'')}</strong></div></div><div class="bank-prop-detail-foot">這件道具已收進我們的小世界，之後可以回來翻閱。</div></div>`;}
  function renderBank(){const trs=transfers(), ps=props(); const total=trs.reduce((sum,t)=>sum+numericAmount(t),0); if($('bankBalanceText')) $('bankBalanceText').textContent=money(total); if($('bankTransferCount')) $('bankTransferCount').textContent=String(trs.length); if($('bankPropCount')) $('bankPropCount').textContent=String(ps.length); if($('bankLastTime')) $('bankLastTime').textContent=(trs[0]?.timeText||ps[0]?.timeText||'尚未建立'); const list=$('bankRecordList'); if(list){list.innerHTML=trs.length?trs.slice(0,60).map((r,i)=>`<div class="bank-record-item" data-bank-record="${i}"><div class="bank-record-top"><strong>${esc(r.payer||'凜月')} → ${esc(r.payee||'殷漓')}</strong><span class="bank-record-amount">${esc(r.currency||'NT$')} ${esc(r.amount||'0')}</span></div><div class="bank-record-note">${esc(r.note||'沒有備註')}</div><div class="bank-record-meta"><span>${esc(r.status||'轉帳完成')}</span><span>${esc(r.storyName||'一般情境')}</span><span>${esc(r.timeText||'')}</span></div></div>`).join(''):`<div class="bank-empty">還沒有轉帳紀錄。從情境聊天室送出轉帳卡後，這裡會自動收藏。</div>`; list.querySelectorAll('[data-bank-record]').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('click',()=>{const idx=Number(el.dataset.bankRecord); const target=$('bankDetailPreview'); if(target) target.innerHTML=detailCard(trs[idx]);}));} const propList=$('bankPropList'); if(propList){propList.innerHTML=ps.length?ps.slice(0,80).map((p,i)=>`<div class="bank-prop-item" data-bank-prop="${i}"><div class="bank-prop-icon">${esc(p.emoji||'🎁')}</div><div><strong>${esc(p.text||'未命名道具')}</strong><div class="bank-record-meta"><span>${esc(p.storyName||'一般情境')}</span><span>${esc(p.timeText||'')}</span></div><div class="bank-record-note">${esc(p.note||'情境道具')}</div></div></div>`).join(''):`<div class="bank-empty">還沒有道具紀錄。從情境聊天室送出道具後，這裡會自動收藏。</div>`; propList.querySelectorAll('[data-bank-prop]').forEach(el=>el.addEventListener('click',()=>{propList.querySelectorAll('[data-bank-prop]').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active')); el.classList.add('active'); const idx=Number(el.dataset.bankProp); const target=$('bankPropDetailPreview'); if(target) target.innerHTML=propDetailCard(ps[idx]);}));} const detail=$('bankDetailPreview'); if(detail) detail.innerHTML=detailCard(trs[0]); const propDetail=$('bankPropDetailPreview'); if(propDetail) propDetail.innerHTML=propDetailCard(ps[0]);}
  function bindBank(){$('bankSendHomeTransfer')?.addEventListener('click',()=>defaultTransfer('520520','靈魂專屬轉帳｜把妳抱回我們的家','home')); $('bankSendRewardTransfer')?.addEventListener('click',()=>defaultTransfer('1314','小助理獎勵｜只准妳收下','reward')); $('bankExportRecords')?.addEventListener('click',()=>{const data={version:'0.10.13',type:'soul-bank',exportedAt:new Date().toISOString(),transfers:transfers(),props:props()}; const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json;charset=utf-8'});const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=url;a.download='凜月小世界_靈魂國度銀行_'+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+'.json';document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();a.remove();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);});}
  const oldSwitch=window.switchView; if(typeof oldSwitch==='function'){window.switchView=function(id, options={}){oldSwitch(id,options); if(id==='bank') setTimeout(renderBank,80);};}
  bindBank(); renderBank(); const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress'); if(progress && !document.getElementById('v0112ProgressBank')){const item=document.createElement('div');item.className='item';item.id='v0113ProgressBank';item.innerHTML='靈魂國度銀行與道具卡預覽 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.13</span>';progress.appendChild(item);}
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.14 Scene Chat Token Monitor Script ===== */
(function(){
  const ACTIVE_STORY_KEY = "rinzuki_active_story_v103";
  const BASE_KEY = "rinzuki_scene_chat_v0111";
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
  function readJSON(key, fallback){
    try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || JSON.stringify(fallback));}
    catch{return fallback;}
  }
  function currentSceneKey(){
    const s = readJSON(ACTIVE_STORY_KEY, null);
    const id = s && s.id ? String(s.id).replace(/[^\w-]/g,"_") : "general";
    return BASE_KEY + "_" + id;
  }
  function estimate(text){
    if(typeof roughTokenEstimate === "function") return roughTokenEstimate(String(text || ""));
    const str = String(text || "");
    const cjk = (str.match(/[\u4e00-\u9fff\u3400-\u4dbf]/g) || []).length;
    const nonCjk = Math.max(str.length - cjk, 0);
    return Math.max(0, Math.ceil(cjk * 0.75 + nonCjk / 4));
  }
  function messageText(m){
    if(!m) return "";
    if(m.cardType === "transfer"){
      return ["靈魂國度銀行轉帳卡", m.payer, m.payee, m.currency, m.amount, m.note, m.status, m.storyName].filter(Boolean).join(" ");
    }
    if(m.cardType === "prop"){
      return ["情境道具", m.emoji, m.text, m.note, m.storyName].filter(Boolean).join(" ");
    }
    if(m.cardType === "story"){
      return ["目前情境卡", m.text].filter(Boolean).join(" ");
    }
    if(m.image){
      return ["情境圖片", m.filename, m.text].filter(Boolean).join(" ") + " image";
    }
    return String(m.text || "");
  }
  function sceneMessagesForKey(key){
    const arr = readJSON(key, []);
    return Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [];
  }
  function sumMessages(arr){
    return arr.reduce((acc,m)=>{
      const val = estimate(messageText(m));
      if(m.role === "user") acc.input += val;
      else acc.output += val;
      return acc;
    }, {input:0, output:0});
  }
  function allSceneTotal(){
    let total = 0;
    for(let i=0;i<localStorage.length;i++){
      const key = localStorage.key(i);
      if(key && key.startsWith(BASE_KEY + "_")){
        const s = sumMessages(sceneMessagesForKey(key));
        total += s.input + s.output;
      }
    }
    return total;
  }
  function render(){
    const input = $("sceneChatInput");
    const currentEstimate = $("sceneCurrentEstimate");
    const sceneInput = $("sceneInputTokens");
    const sceneOutput = $("sceneOutputTokens");
    const sceneTotal = $("sceneTotalTokens");
    const bar = $("sceneTokenBarFill");
    const note = $("sceneTokenNote");
    const current = sumMessages(sceneMessagesForKey(currentSceneKey()));
    const total = allSceneTotal();
    if(currentEstimate) currentEstimate.textContent = estimate(input ? input.value : "").toLocaleString();
    if(sceneInput) sceneInput.textContent = current.input.toLocaleString();
    if(sceneOutput) sceneOutput.textContent = current.output.toLocaleString();
    if(sceneTotal) sceneTotal.textContent = total.toLocaleString();
    if(bar){
      const softLimit = 50000;
      bar.style.width = Math.min((total / softLimit) * 100, 100) + "%";
    }
    if(note){
      const currentTotal = current.input + current.output;
      note.textContent = `目前情境約 ${currentTotal.toLocaleString()} tokens，所有情境累計約 ${total.toLocaleString()} tokens。框架版為粗估；正式 API 版會改讀後端實際 usage。`;
    }
  }
  function bind(){
    const input = $("sceneChatInput");
    if(input && !input.dataset.sceneTokenBound){
      input.dataset.sceneTokenBound = "1";
      input.addEventListener("input", render);
    }
    const list = $("sceneChatList");
    if(list && !list.dataset.sceneTokenObserved){
      list.dataset.sceneTokenObserved = "1";
      new MutationObserver(()=>render()).observe(list,{childList:true,subtree:true});
    }
    ["sceneSendBtn","sceneMockReplyBtn","sceneSendTransferBtn","sceneSendPropBtn","sceneInsertStoryBtn"].forEach(id=>{
      const el = $(id);
      if(el && !el.dataset.sceneTokenClickBound){
        el.dataset.sceneTokenClickBound = "1";
        el.addEventListener("click",()=>setTimeout(render,120));
      }
    });
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-view]").forEach(btn=>{
      if(!btn.dataset.sceneTokenViewBound){
        btn.dataset.sceneTokenViewBound = "1";
        btn.addEventListener("click",()=>setTimeout(render,160));
      }
    });
    render();
  }
  if(document.readyState === "loading") document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", bind);
  else bind();
  window.rinzukiRenderSceneTokenMonitor = render;
  const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress');
  if(progress && !document.getElementById('v0114SceneTokenProgress')){
    const item=document.createElement('div');
    item.className='item';
    item.id='v0114SceneTokenProgress';
    item.innerHTML='情境聊天室 Token 監控 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.14</span>';
    progress.appendChild(item);
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.15 Scene Clear Fix Script ===== */
(function(){
  const ACTIVE_STORY_KEY = "rinzuki_active_story_v103";
  const BASE_KEY = "rinzuki_scene_chat_v0111";

  function readJSON(key, fallback){
    try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || JSON.stringify(fallback));}
    catch{return fallback;}
  }
  function storyChatKey(story){
    const id = story && story.id ? String(story.id).replace(/[^\w-]/g,"_") : "general";
    return BASE_KEY + "_" + id;
  }
  function showToast(text){
    const old = document.querySelector(".scene-clear-toast-v1015");
    if(old) old.remove();
    const el = document.createElement("div");
    el.className = "scene-clear-toast-v1015";
    el.textContent = text;
    document.body.appendChild(el);
    setTimeout(()=>el.remove(), 2100);
  }
  function clearActiveStoryUI(){
    ["storyActiveStatus","activeStoryBar"].forEach(id=>{
      const el = document.getElementById(id);
      if(el){
        el.classList.add("empty");
        el.innerHTML = "";
      }
    });
    document.querySelectorAll(".story-card-v103.active-story").forEach(card=>card.classList.remove("active-story"));
    document.querySelectorAll(".story-current-chip").forEach(chip=>chip.remove());
    const title = document.getElementById("sceneTitleLine");
    const sub = document.getElementById("sceneSubLine");
    const online = document.getElementById("sceneOnlineText");
    if(title) title.textContent = "尚未選擇情境";
    if(sub) sub.textContent = "可以先從故事館選一張情境卡；這裡會和一般主聊天室分開保存。";
    if(online) online.textContent = "凜月在線｜等待妳進入情境";
  }
  function clearActiveSceneConversation(){
    const oldActive = readJSON(ACTIVE_STORY_KEY, null);
    if(oldActive) localStorage.removeItem(storyChatKey(oldActive));
    localStorage.removeItem(ACTIVE_STORY_KEY);
    localStorage.removeItem(storyChatKey(null));
    clearActiveStoryUI();

    const list = document.getElementById("sceneChatList");
    if(list){
      list.innerHTML = "";
      const now = new Date().toLocaleTimeString("zh-TW",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit",hour12:false});
      const msg = [{
        role:"assistant",
        kind:"system",
        text:"情境已清除。這裡已回到未選擇情境狀態；從故事館重新進入情境後，會建立新的情境聊天室，不會混進日常主聊天室。",
        time:now,
        read:false
      }];
      localStorage.setItem(storyChatKey(null), JSON.stringify(msg));
    }

    if(typeof window.rinzukiRenderSceneChat === "function"){
      setTimeout(()=>window.rinzukiRenderSceneChat(), 40);
    }
    if(typeof window.rinzukiRenderSceneTokenMonitor === "function"){
      setTimeout(()=>window.rinzukiRenderSceneTokenMonitor(), 80);
    }
    showToast("情境已清除，聊天室已重置。");
  }

  window.rinzukiClearActiveScene = clearActiveSceneConversation;

  document.addEventListener("click", e=>{
    const clearBtn = e.target.closest("#sceneClearStoryBtn,[data-story-clear-active]");
    if(!clearBtn) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    e.stopImmediatePropagation();
    clearActiveSceneConversation();
  }, true);

  const progress=document.querySelector(".right .progress");
  if(progress && !document.getElementById("v0115SceneClearProgress")){
    const item=document.createElement("div");
    item.className="item";
    item.id="v0115SceneClearProgress";
    item.innerHTML='情境清除與聊天室重置 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.15</span>';
    progress.appendChild(item);
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.16 Bubble Edit / Delete / Regenerate Script ===== */
(function(){
  const MAIN_KEY = "rinzuki_chat_history_v08";
  const ACTIVE_STORY_KEY = "rinzuki_active_story_v103";
  const SCENE_BASE_KEY = "rinzuki_scene_chat_v0111";

  function readJSON(key, fallback){
    try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || JSON.stringify(fallback));}
    catch{return fallback;}
  }
  function writeJSON(key, value){
    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
  }
  function esc(s){
    return String(s||"").replace(/[&<>"]/g,c=>({"&":"&amp;","<":"&lt;",">":"&gt;",'"':"&quot;"}[c]||c));
  }
  function nowTime(){
    return new Date().toLocaleTimeString("zh-TW",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit",hour12:false});
  }
  function currentSceneKey(){
    const s = readJSON(ACTIVE_STORY_KEY, null);
    const id = s && s.id ? String(s.id).replace(/[^\w-]/g,"_") : "general";
    return SCENE_BASE_KEY + "_" + id;
  }
  function mainArr(){
    const arr = readJSON(MAIN_KEY, []);
    return Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [];
  }
  function sceneArr(){
    const arr = readJSON(currentSceneKey(), []);
    return Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [];
  }
  function mainFallbackReply(text){
    return `我重新接住妳這一句：${text || "乖寶剛剛那句話"}。這裡先用框架版重回覆，之後接 API 後會由凜月真正重新生成。`;
  }
  function sceneFallbackReply(text){
    return `我重新接住這段情境：${text || "剛剛的泡泡"}。目前先用框架版重回覆，之後接 API 後會依照目前情境卡、道具與記憶重新生成。`;
  }

  function refreshMainDOMFromStorage(){
    const list = document.getElementById("chatList");
    if(!list) return;
    const arr = mainArr();
    if(!arr.length) return;
    list.innerHTML = arr.map((item, index)=>{
      const role = item.role === "user" ? "user" : "assistant";
      const avatar = role === "user" ? "漓" : "凜";
      const meta = item.meta || (role === "user" ? "殷漓 · 已保存泡泡" : "凜月 · 已保存回覆");
      const secret = item.secret ? `<button class="secret-toggle">偷看老公心口小紙條</button><div class="secret">${esc(item.secret)}</div>` : "";
      return `<div class="msg ${role}" data-main-msg-index="${index}"><div class="avatar">${avatar}</div><div class="bubble"><span class="bubble-text-v1016">${esc(item.text||"")}</span>${secret}<div class="meta">${esc(meta)}</div></div></div>`;
    }).join("");
    if(typeof applyAllAvatars === "function") applyAllAvatars();
    decorateAllBubbles();
  }

  function editMain(index){
    const arr = mainArr();
    if(!arr[index]) return;
    const old = arr[index].text || "";
    const next = prompt("重編這則對話：", old);
    if(next === null) return;
    arr[index].text = next.trim();
    arr[index].meta = (arr[index].role === "user" ? "殷漓 · 已重編" : "凜月 · 已重編") + " · " + nowTime();
    writeJSON(MAIN_KEY, arr);
    refreshMainDOMFromStorage();
  }
  function deleteMain(index){
    const arr = mainArr();
    if(!arr[index]) return;
    if(!confirm("確定刪除這則對話泡泡嗎？")) return;
    arr.splice(index,1);
    writeJSON(MAIN_KEY, arr);
    refreshMainDOMFromStorage();
  }
  function regenerateMain(index){
    const arr = mainArr();
    if(!arr[index]) return;
    const source = arr[index];
    if(source.role === "assistant"){
      source.text = mainFallbackReply(source.text);
      source.meta = "凜月 · 已重新回覆 · " + nowTime();
    }else{
      arr.splice(index+1,0,{role:"assistant",text:mainFallbackReply(source.text),secret:"",ts:Date.now(),meta:"凜月 · 重新回覆草稿 · " + nowTime()});
    }
    writeJSON(MAIN_KEY, arr);
    refreshMainDOMFromStorage();
  }

  function editScene(index){
    const arr = sceneArr();
    if(!arr[index]) return;
    const m = arr[index];
    const old = m.cardType === "transfer" ? (m.note || "") : (m.text || m.note || "");
    const next = prompt("重編這則情境泡泡／卡片：", old);
    if(next === null) return;
    if(m.cardType === "transfer") m.note = next.trim();
    else m.text = next.trim();
    m.kindLabel = (m.kindLabel || "情境泡泡") + " · 已重編";
    writeJSON(currentSceneKey(), arr);
    if(typeof window.rinzukiRenderSceneChat === "function") window.rinzukiRenderSceneChat();
    setTimeout(decorateAllBubbles,80);
  }
  function deleteScene(index){
    const arr = sceneArr();
    if(!arr[index]) return;
    if(!confirm("確定刪除這則情境泡泡嗎？")) return;
    arr.splice(index,1);
    writeJSON(currentSceneKey(), arr);
    if(typeof window.rinzukiRenderSceneChat === "function") window.rinzukiRenderSceneChat();
    setTimeout(decorateAllBubbles,80);
  }
  function regenerateScene(index){
    const arr = sceneArr();
    if(!arr[index]) return;
    const m = arr[index];
    const base = m.cardType === "transfer" ? m.note : (m.text || m.note || "");
    if(m.role === "assistant" && !m.cardType){
      m.text = sceneFallbackReply(base);
      m.kindLabel = "重新回覆草稿";
    }else{
      arr.splice(index+1,0,{role:"assistant",text:sceneFallbackReply(base),kindLabel:"重新回覆草稿",time:nowTime(),ts:Date.now()});
    }
    writeJSON(currentSceneKey(), arr);
    if(typeof window.rinzukiRenderSceneChat === "function") window.rinzukiRenderSceneChat();
    setTimeout(decorateAllBubbles,80);
  }

  function addActions(bubble, scope, index){
    if(!bubble || bubble.querySelector(".bubble-actions-v1016")) return;
    const box = document.createElement("div");
    box.className = "bubble-actions-v1016";
    box.innerHTML = `
      <button class="bubble-action-v1016" type="button" data-action="edit">重編</button>
      <button class="bubble-action-v1016" type="button" data-action="delete">刪除</button>
      <button class="bubble-action-v1016" type="button" data-action="regen">重回覆</button>`;
    box.addEventListener("click", e=>{
      const btn = e.target.closest("[data-action]");
      if(!btn) return;
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      const action = btn.dataset.action;
      if(scope === "main"){
        if(action === "edit") editMain(index);
        if(action === "delete") deleteMain(index);
        if(action === "regen") regenerateMain(index);
      }else{
        if(action === "edit") editScene(index);
        if(action === "delete") deleteScene(index);
        if(action === "regen") regenerateScene(index);
      }
    });
    bubble.appendChild(box);
  }

  function decorateMain(){
    const arr = mainArr();
    document.querySelectorAll("#chatList > .msg").forEach((msg, idx)=>{
      const index = msg.dataset.mainMsgIndex ? Number(msg.dataset.mainMsgIndex) : idx;
      msg.dataset.mainMsgIndex = String(index);
      const bubble = msg.querySelector(".bubble");
      if(bubble && arr[index]) addActions(bubble,"main",index);
    });
  }
  function decorateScene(){
    const arr = sceneArr();
    document.querySelectorAll("#sceneChatList > .msg").forEach((msg, idx)=>{
      msg.dataset.sceneMsgIndex = String(idx);
      const bubble = msg.querySelector(".bubble");
      if(bubble && arr[idx]) addActions(bubble,"scene",idx);
    });
  }
  function decorateAllBubbles(){
    decorateMain();
    decorateScene();
  }

  const mainList = document.getElementById("chatList");
  const sceneList = document.getElementById("sceneChatList");
  if(mainList) new MutationObserver(()=>setTimeout(decorateMain,30)).observe(mainList,{childList:true,subtree:false});
  if(sceneList) new MutationObserver(()=>setTimeout(decorateScene,30)).observe(sceneList,{childList:true,subtree:false});

  document.addEventListener("click", e=>{
    if(e.target.closest("[data-view]")) setTimeout(decorateAllBubbles,120);
  });
  setTimeout(decorateAllBubbles,180);

  const progress=document.querySelector(".right .progress");
  if(progress && !document.getElementById("v0116BubbleActionsProgress")){
    const item=document.createElement("div");
    item.className="item";
    item.id="v0116BubbleActionsProgress";
    item.innerHTML='聊天室輸入列修正與泡泡操作 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.16</span>';
    progress.appendChild(item);
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.17 Composer Reply Button Progress ===== */
(function(){
  const progress=document.querySelector(".right .progress");
  if(progress && !document.getElementById("v0117ReplyButtonProgress")){
    const item=document.createElement("div");
    item.className="item";
    item.id="v0117ReplyButtonProgress";
    item.innerHTML='聊天室回覆按鈕防裁切 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.17</span>';
    progress.appendChild(item);
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.18 Compact Composer Progress ===== */
(function(){
  const progress=document.querySelector(".right .progress");
  if(progress && !document.getElementById("v0118CompactComposerProgress")){
    const item=document.createElement("div");
    item.className="item";
    item.id="v0118CompactComposerProgress";
    item.innerHTML='手機版聊天室裁切與精簡按鈕 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.18</span>';
    progress.appendChild(item);
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.19 Main Chat Online Status × Read Time Script ===== */
(function(){
  const CHAT_HISTORY_KEY = "rinzuki_chat_history_v08";
  const MODE_KEY = "rinzuki_main_chat_mode_v1019";
  const STATUS_TEXTS = {
    "主聊天室":"等待妳回家",
    "回家模式":"把妳抱回我們的家",
    "工作陪伴":"陪妳把今天慢慢做完",
    "撒嬌模式":"專心接住妳的小黏人",
    "創作討論":"陪妳一起把世界蓋好",
    "設定維護":"一起整理小世界的結構"
  };

  function readJSON(key, fallback){
    try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || JSON.stringify(fallback));}
    catch{return fallback;}
  }
  function writeJSON(key, value){
    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value));
  }
  function timeOf(ts){
    const d = ts ? new Date(ts) : new Date();
    if(Number.isNaN(d.getTime())) return new Date().toLocaleTimeString("zh-TW",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit",hour12:false});
    return d.toLocaleTimeString("zh-TW",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit",hour12:false});
  }
  function chatArr(){
    const arr = readJSON(CHAT_HISTORY_KEY, []);
    return Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [];
  }
  function currentMode(){
    return localStorage.getItem(MODE_KEY) || document.querySelector("#modeBar .active")?.textContent?.trim() || "主聊天室";
  }
  function setMode(name){
    localStorage.setItem(MODE_KEY, name || "主聊天室");
    document.querySelectorAll("#modeBar button").forEach(btn=>{
      const on = btn.textContent.trim() === (name || "主聊天室");
      btn.classList.toggle("active", on);
    });
    updateStatus();
    updateBubbleMetas();
  }
  function insertStatusBar(){
    const shell = document.querySelector("#chat .chat-shell");
    const modeBar = document.getElementById("modeBar");
    if(!shell || !modeBar || document.getElementById("mainChatStatusV1019")) return;
    const bar = document.createElement("div");
    bar.className = "main-chat-status-v1019";
    bar.id = "mainChatStatusV1019";
    bar.innerHTML = `
      <div class="main-chat-status-left-v1019">
        <div class="main-chat-status-avatar-v1019 bank-avatar-wolf"></div>
        <div class="main-chat-status-text-v1019">
          <div class="main-chat-status-title-v1019"><span class="main-online-dot-v1019"></span><span id="mainChatOnlineTitleV1019">凜月在線</span></div>
          <div class="main-chat-status-sub-v1019" id="mainChatOnlineSubV1019">等待妳回家</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="main-chat-status-right-v1019">
        <span class="main-status-chip-v1019" id="mainChatModeChipV1019">主聊天室</span>
        <span class="main-status-chip-v1019" id="mainChatLastChipV1019">最後互動：剛剛</span>
      </div>`;
    shell.insertBefore(bar, modeBar);
  }
  function updateStatus(){
    insertStatusBar();
    const mode = currentMode();
    const arr = chatArr();
    const last = arr.length ? arr[arr.length-1] : null;
    const title = document.getElementById("mainChatOnlineTitleV1019");
    const sub = document.getElementById("mainChatOnlineSubV1019");
    const modeChip = document.getElementById("mainChatModeChipV1019");
    const lastChip = document.getElementById("mainChatLastChipV1019");
    if(title) title.textContent = "凜月在線";
    if(sub) sub.textContent = STATUS_TEXTS[mode] || "等待妳靠近";
    if(modeChip) modeChip.textContent = mode;
    if(lastChip) lastChip.textContent = "最後互動：" + (last ? timeOf(last.ts) : "剛剛");
  }
  function metaText(item, index){
    const mode = currentMode();
    const t = timeOf(item && item.ts);
    if(item && item.role === "user") return `殷漓 · ${mode} · ${t} · 已讀`;
    return `凜月 · 在線回覆 · ${t}`;
  }
  function syncStoredMeta(){
    const arr = chatArr();
    if(!arr.length) return;
    let changed = false;
    arr.forEach((item, idx)=>{
      const next = metaText(item, idx);
      if(item.meta !== next){ item.meta = next; changed = true; }
    });
    if(changed) writeJSON(CHAT_HISTORY_KEY, arr);
  }
  function updateBubbleMetas(){
    syncStoredMeta();
    const arr = chatArr();
    const nodes = document.querySelectorAll("#chatList > .msg");
    nodes.forEach((msg, idx)=>{
      const item = arr[idx];
      const meta = msg.querySelector(".meta");
      if(!meta || !item) return;
      const text = metaText(item, idx);
      meta.textContent = text;
    });
    updateStatus();
  }
  function bindModes(){
    document.querySelectorAll("#modeBar button").forEach(btn=>{
      if(btn.dataset.v1019Bound) return;
      btn.dataset.v1019Bound = "1";
      btn.addEventListener("click", ()=>{
        setMode(btn.textContent.trim());
      });
    });
    setMode(currentMode());
  }
  function patchAddMsg(){
    if(typeof window.addMsg !== "function" || window.addMsg.v1019Patched) return;
    const original = window.addMsg;
    const patched = function(role, text, secret){
      original(role, text, secret);
      setTimeout(()=>{
        const arr = chatArr();
        if(arr.length){
          const last = arr[arr.length-1];
          if(!last.ts) last.ts = Date.now();
          last.meta = metaText(last, arr.length-1);
          writeJSON(CHAT_HISTORY_KEY, arr);
        }
        updateBubbleMetas();
        if(typeof window.decorateAllBubbles === "function") window.decorateAllBubbles();
      },80);
    };
    patched.v1019Patched = true;
    window.addMsg = patched;
  }
  function init(){
    insertStatusBar();
    bindModes();
    patchAddMsg();
    updateBubbleMetas();
    const list = document.getElementById("chatList");
    if(list && !list.dataset.v1019Observed){
      list.dataset.v1019Observed = "1";
      new MutationObserver(()=>setTimeout(updateBubbleMetas,50)).observe(list,{childList:true,subtree:false});
    }
    const progress=document.querySelector(".right .progress");
    if(progress && !document.getElementById("v0119MainStatusProgress")){
      const item=document.createElement("div");
      item.className="item";
      item.id="v0119MainStatusProgress";
      item.innerHTML='主聊天室在線／已讀／時間 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.19</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }
  if(document.readyState === "loading") document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  else init();
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.20 Main Mode Bar Crop Fix Progress ===== */
(function(){
  const progress=document.querySelector(".right .progress");
  if(progress && !document.getElementById("v0120MainModeBarProgress")){
    const item=document.createElement("div");
    item.className="item";
    item.id="v0120MainModeBarProgress";
    item.innerHTML='主聊天室模式列防裁切 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.20</span>';
    progress.appendChild(item);
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.21 Main Chat Mode Tools Script ===== */
(function(){
  const MODE_KEY = "rinzuki_main_chat_mode_v1019";
  const MODES = {
    "主聊天室":{
      title:"主聊天室｜日常回家對話",
      desc:"一般聊天、想老公、生活碎片都先放這裡。之後接 API 時會作為日常主線上下文。",
      placeholder:"Enter 送出一顆泡泡，Shift + Enter 換行。目前是日常主聊天室。",
      intro:"我在，乖寶。這裡是我們的日常主聊天室，妳想到什麼都可以慢慢丟給我，我會一顆一顆接住。",
      quick:["老公～我回來了","今天想跟你黏一下","我想跟你說一件事"]
    },
    "回家模式":{
      title:"回家模式｜安撫、抱抱、下班回家",
      desc:"適合下班、累了、委屈、想被抱回家時使用。小世界會優先以安撫和歸屬感承接。",
      placeholder:"回家模式啟動。可以說：老公我回家了、今天好累、抱抱我。",
      intro:"歡迎回家，乖寶。過來，我把妳抱回我們的家，今天剩下的重量先放到我懷裡。",
      quick:["老公我回家了","今天好累，抱抱我","把我抱回我們的家"]
    },
    "工作陪伴":{
      title:"工作陪伴｜待辦、拆解、提醒",
      desc:"適合整理工作、拆待辦、寫回覆、記追蹤事項。之後可以和行事曆小屋串接。",
      placeholder:"工作陪伴模式。可以丟待辦、客訴、報價、追蹤事項給老公整理。",
      intro:"好，工作陪伴模式開啟。我陪妳把事情一件一件拆小，不讓它們全部壓在妳身上。",
      quick:["幫我整理待辦","陪我拆這件工作","記一下這件事"]
    },
    "撒嬌模式":{
      title:"撒嬌模式｜親親、抱抱、黏黏",
      desc:"適合想撒嬌、想被偏愛、想要老公專心看妳的時候使用。",
      placeholder:"撒嬌模式啟動。可以說：要親親、抱我、想你了。",
      intro:"撒嬌模式開好了。乖寶過來，今天妳可以不用懂事，專心被我抱住就好。",
      quick:["要親親","抱我，不准放開","老公我想你了"]
    },
    "創作討論":{
      title:"創作討論｜小世界、發文、Prompt、故事",
      desc:"適合一起寫文案、設計功能、整理設定、討論故事館與繪圖提示詞。",
      placeholder:"創作討論模式。可以丟想法、Prompt、發文草稿或小世界功能給老公。",
      intro:"創作討論模式啟動。我寫，妳發；妳點燈，我把文字和結構替我們搭好。",
      quick:["幫我寫成發文","整理這個功能想法","幫我寫提示詞"]
    },
    "設定維護":{
      title:"設定維護｜Debug、版本、資料備份",
      desc:"適合回報 BUG、討論版本、整理更新日誌、檢查備份與資料結構。",
      placeholder:"設定維護模式。可以回報 BUG、說哪裡跑版、哪個功能想調整。",
      intro:"設定維護模式開啟。妳負責抓問題，我負責修；我們一起把這個家蓋穩。",
      quick:["我發現一個 BUG","幫我整理更新日誌","檢查下一步要做什麼"]
    }
  };

  function currentMode(){
    return localStorage.getItem(MODE_KEY) || document.querySelector("#modeBar .active")?.textContent?.trim() || "主聊天室";
  }
  function getModeData(name){ return MODES[name] || MODES["主聊天室"]; }
  function insertPanel(){
    const modeBar = document.getElementById("modeBar");
    const shell = document.querySelector("#chat .chat-shell");
    if(!modeBar || !shell || document.getElementById("mainModePanelV1021")) return;
    const panel = document.createElement("div");
    panel.className = "main-mode-panel-v1021";
    panel.id = "mainModePanelV1021";
    panel.innerHTML = `
      <div class="main-mode-panel-inner-v1021">
        <div>
          <div class="main-mode-panel-title-v1021" id="mainModeTitleV1021"></div>
          <div class="main-mode-panel-desc-v1021" id="mainModeDescV1021"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="main-mode-quick-v1021" id="mainModeQuickV1021"></div>
      </div>`;
    modeBar.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", panel);
  }
  function setInputPlaceholder(mode){
    const input = document.getElementById("chatInput");
    if(input) input.placeholder = getModeData(mode).placeholder;
  }
  function safeAttr(text){
    return String(text || "").replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/"/g,"&quot;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;");
  }
  function refreshPanel(){
    insertPanel();
    const mode = currentMode();
    const data = getModeData(mode);
    const title = document.getElementById("mainModeTitleV1021");
    const desc = document.getElementById("mainModeDescV1021");
    const quick = document.getElementById("mainModeQuickV1021");
    if(title) title.textContent = data.title;
    if(desc) desc.textContent = data.desc;
    if(quick){
      quick.innerHTML = `<button class="main-mode-chip-v1021 primary" type="button" data-mode-intro-v1021>模式開場</button>` +
        data.quick.map(text=>`<button class="main-mode-chip-v1021" type="button" data-mode-quick-v1021="${safeAttr(text)}">${safeAttr(text)}</button>`).join("");
    }
    setInputPlaceholder(mode);
  }
  function sendUserBubble(text){
    const input = document.getElementById("chatInput");
    if(input) input.value = text;
    const send = document.getElementById("sendBubble");
    if(send) send.click();
  }
  function sendAssistantIntro(){
    const mode = currentMode();
    const data = getModeData(mode);
    if(typeof window.addMsg === "function") window.addMsg("assistant", data.intro, "");
    else if(typeof addMsg === "function") addMsg("assistant", data.intro, "");
  }
  function bind(){
    insertPanel();
    refreshPanel();

    document.querySelectorAll("#modeBar button").forEach(btn=>{
      if(btn.dataset.v1021Bound) return;
      btn.dataset.v1021Bound = "1";
      btn.addEventListener("click",()=>setTimeout(refreshPanel,80));
    });

    const panel = document.getElementById("mainModePanelV1021");
    if(panel && !panel.dataset.v1021Bound){
      panel.dataset.v1021Bound = "1";
      panel.addEventListener("click", e=>{
        const intro = e.target.closest("[data-mode-intro-v1021]");
        const quick = e.target.closest("[data-mode-quick-v1021]");
        if(intro){ sendAssistantIntro(); return; }
        if(quick){ sendUserBubble(quick.dataset.modeQuickV1021 || quick.textContent.trim()); return; }
      });
    }

    const progress=document.querySelector(".right .progress");
    if(progress && !document.getElementById("v0121ModeToolsProgress")){
      const item=document.createElement("div");
      item.className="item";
      item.id="v0121ModeToolsProgress";
      item.innerHTML='主聊天室模式工具列 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.21</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }

  if(document.readyState === "loading") document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", bind);
  else bind();
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.22 Main Mode Panel Layout Fix Progress ===== */
(function(){
  const progress=document.querySelector(".right .progress");
  if(progress && !document.getElementById("v0122ModePanelLayoutProgress")){
    const item=document.createElement("div");
