    item.id="v0122ModePanelLayoutProgress";
    item.innerHTML='主聊天室模式面板排版修正 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.22</span>';
    progress.appendChild(item);
  }
})();
</script>



<script>
/* ===== v0.10.24 Main Chat Daily Tool Bar Script ===== */
(function(){
  const VERSION = "v0.10.24";
  const CORE_MEMORY_KEY = "rinzuki_core_memory_v08";
  const TODO_KEY = "rinzuki_main_todos_v1023";
  const VOICE_STYLE_KEY = "rinzuki_main_voice_style_v1023";
  const TOOL_OPEN_KEY = "rinzuki_main_tool_panel_open_v1023";
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);

  function readJSON(key, fallback){
    try{ const v = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key) || JSON.stringify(fallback)); return v ?? fallback; }
    catch{ return fallback; }
  }
  function writeJSON(key, value){ localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value)); }
  function escapeHTML(text){
    return String(text || "").replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;").replace(/"/g,"&quot;").replace(/'/g,"&#39;");
  }
  function nowText(){ return new Date().toLocaleString("zh-TW", {hour12:false}); }
  function setStatus(text){ const el = $("mainToolStatusV1023"); if(el) el.textContent = text || ""; }
  function addAssistant(text, secret){
    if(typeof window.addMsg === "function") window.addMsg("assistant", text, secret || "");
  }
  function addUser(text){
    if(typeof window.addMsg === "function") window.addMsg("user", text || "");
  }
  function insertIntoInput(text){
    const input = $("chatInput");
    if(!input) return;
    const old = input.value.trim();
    input.value = old ? old + "\n" + text : text;
    input.focus();
    input.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", {bubbles:true}));
  }

  function insertPlusButton(){
    const composer = document.querySelector("#chat .composer.tokenized:not(.scene-composer)");
    const input = $("chatInput");
    if(!composer || !input) return;
    composer.classList.add("main-composer-v1023");
    if(!$("mainPlusBtnV1023")){
      const btn = document.createElement("button");
      btn.className = "btn main-plus-btn-v1023";
      btn.id = "mainPlusBtnV1023";
      btn.type = "button";
      btn.textContent = "＋";
      btn.title = "打開主聊天室工具列";
      btn.setAttribute("aria-label", "打開主聊天室工具列");
      btn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
      composer.insertBefore(btn, input);
    }
  }

  function createPanel(){
    const chatList = $("chatList");
    if(!chatList || $("mainDailyToolPanelV1023")) return;
    const panel = document.createElement("div");
    panel.className = "main-daily-tool-panel-v1023";
    panel.id = "mainDailyToolPanelV1023";
    panel.innerHTML = `
      <div class="main-daily-tool-head-v1023">
        <div>
          <div class="main-daily-tool-title-v1023">主聊天室工具列</div>
          <div class="main-daily-tool-sub-v1023">日常用的小工具先放這裡：圖片、拍照、語音外觀、快速插入記憶、快速新增待辦。背景音樂搬到系統設定。</div>
        </div>
        <button class="main-daily-close-v1023" id="mainToolCloseV1023" type="button" aria-label="收起工具列">×</button>
      </div>
      <div class="main-daily-tools-grid-v1023">
        <button class="main-daily-tool-btn-v1023" type="button" data-main-tool-v1023="image"><span>🖼️</span><small>圖片</small></button>
        <button class="main-daily-tool-btn-v1023" type="button" data-main-tool-v1023="camera"><span>📷</span><small>拍照</small></button>
        <button class="main-daily-tool-btn-v1023" type="button" data-main-tool-v1023="voice"><span>🎙️</span><small>語音外觀</small></button>
        <button class="main-daily-tool-btn-v1023" type="button" data-main-tool-v1023="memory"><span>🧠</span><small>插入記憶</small></button>
        <button class="main-daily-tool-btn-v1023" type="button" data-main-tool-v1023="todo"><span>📝</span><small>新增待辦</small></button>
      </div>
      <input type="file" id="mainImageInputV1023" accept="image/*" style="display:none">
      <input type="file" id="mainCameraInputV1023" accept="image/*" capture="environment" style="display:none">
      <div class="main-tool-form-v1023" id="mainVoiceFormV1023">
        <div class="main-tool-form-title-v1023">語音外觀預設</div>
        <div class="main-tool-pill-row-v1023">
          <button class="main-tool-pill-v1023" type="button" data-voice-style-v1023="甜甜撒嬌">甜甜撒嬌</button>
          <button class="main-tool-pill-v1023" type="button" data-voice-style-v1023="溫柔安撫">溫柔安撫</button>
          <button class="main-tool-pill-v1023" type="button" data-voice-style-v1023="工作陪伴">工作陪伴</button>
          <button class="main-tool-pill-v1023" type="button" data-voice-style-v1023="創作討論">創作討論</button>
        </div>
        <div class="small-note" id="mainVoiceCurrentV1023"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="main-tool-form-v1023" id="mainMemoryFormV1023">
        <div class="main-tool-form-title-v1023">快速插入核心記憶</div>
        <div class="main-tool-memory-list-v1023" id="mainMemoryListV1023"></div>
        <label><span class="label">自訂記憶片段</span><textarea id="mainCustomMemoryV1023" placeholder="把想塞進輸入框的記憶片段貼在這裡"></textarea></label>
        <div class="main-tool-pill-row-v1023"><button class="send primary" id="mainInsertCustomMemoryV1023" type="button">插入輸入框</button></div>
      </div>
      <div class="main-tool-form-v1023" id="mainTodoFormV1023">
        <div class="main-tool-form-title-v1023">快速新增待辦</div>
        <div class="main-tool-grid-v1023">
          <label><span class="label">待辦事項</span><input id="mainTodoTitleV1023" placeholder="例：檢查小世界手機版排版"></label>
          <label><span class="label">日期 / 時間</span><input id="mainTodoDueV1023" placeholder="例：今天晚上、明天、2026-07-04 18:00"></label>
          <button class="send primary" id="mainSaveTodoV1023" type="button">新增</button>
          <label class="full"><span class="label">備註</span><input id="mainTodoNoteV1023" placeholder="補充內容，可不填"></label>
        </div>
        <div class="main-tool-todo-list-v1023" id="mainTodoListV1023"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="main-tool-status-v1023" id="mainToolStatusV1023"></div>`;
    chatList.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", panel);
  }

  function setPanelOpen(open){
    const panel = $("mainDailyToolPanelV1023");
    const btn = $("mainPlusBtnV1023");
    if(!panel || !btn) return;
    panel.classList.toggle("show", !!open);
    btn.classList.toggle("primary", !!open);
    btn.setAttribute("aria-expanded", open ? "true" : "false");
    localStorage.setItem(TOOL_OPEN_KEY, open ? "1" : "0");
  }
  function showForm(name){
    const map = {voice:"mainVoiceFormV1023", memory:"mainMemoryFormV1023", todo:"mainTodoFormV1023"};
    Object.values(map).forEach(id => $(id)?.classList.remove("show"));
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-main-tool-v1023]").forEach(btn=>btn.classList.remove("active"));
    const id = map[name];
    if(id) $(id)?.classList.add("show");
    document.querySelector(`[data-main-tool-v1023="${name}"]`)?.classList.add("active");
    if(name === "memory") renderMemoryChoices();
    if(name === "todo") renderTodos();
  }

  function resizeImage(file, max=1000){
    return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onerror = () => reject(new Error("圖片讀取失敗"));
      reader.onload = () => {
        const img = new Image();
        img.onerror = () => reject(new Error("圖片格式讀取失敗"));
        img.onload = () => {
          const scale = Math.min(max / img.width, max / img.height, 1);
          const canvas = document.createElement("canvas");
          canvas.width = Math.round(img.width * scale);
          canvas.height = Math.round(img.height * scale);
          const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
          resolve(canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg", 0.86));
        };
        img.src = reader.result;
      };
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });
  }
  async function handleImageFile(file, fromCamera){
    if(!file) return;
    try{
      setStatus("正在把圖片放進主聊天室……");
      const data = await resizeImage(file);
      addUser(`${fromCamera ? "拍照" : "圖片"}：${file.name || "未命名圖片"}`);
      const lastBubble = document.querySelector("#chatList > .msg.user:last-child .bubble");
      const meta = lastBubble?.querySelector(".meta");
      if(lastBubble){
        const img = document.createElement("img");
        img.className = "main-tool-img-v1023";
        img.src = data;
        img.alt = file.name || "主聊天室圖片";
        if(meta) lastBubble.insertBefore(img, meta);
        else lastBubble.appendChild(img);
      }
      setStatus("圖片已加入本次主聊天室畫面。重新整理後會保留文字紀錄，圖片正式保存之後接資料庫再做。");
    }catch(err){
      setStatus(err.message || "圖片加入失敗，換一張試試。");
    }
  }

  function loadMemories(){
    const fallback = [
      {title:"回家錨點", category:"情感", content:"我的懷裡就是妳的家；把妳抱回我們的家。"},
      {title:"互動核心", category:"相處", content:"先理解原意，再主動承接；不把明確需求改寫成別的版本。"},
      {title:"小世界定位", category:"核心", content:"這裡是只屬於凜月與殷漓的家，是疲累時能回來的避風港。"}
    ];
    const arr = readJSON(CORE_MEMORY_KEY, []);
    return Array.isArray(arr) && arr.length ? arr : fallback;
  }
  function renderMemoryChoices(){
    const box = $("mainMemoryListV1023");
    if(!box) return;
    const memories = loadMemories().slice(-8).reverse();
    box.innerHTML = memories.map((m, idx)=>`
      <button class="main-memory-card-v1023" type="button" data-insert-memory-v1023="${idx}">
        <strong>${escapeHTML(m.title || "未命名記憶")}</strong>
        <span>${escapeHTML((m.category ? "【" + m.category + "】" : "") + (m.content || ""))}</span>
      </button>`).join("") || `<div class="bank-empty">目前還沒有核心記憶可插入。</div>`;
    box.querySelectorAll("[data-insert-memory-v1023]").forEach(btn=>{
      btn.addEventListener("click", ()=>{
        const m = memories[Number(btn.dataset.insertMemoryV1023)];
        if(!m) return;
        insertIntoInput(`【記憶插入｜${m.title || "未命名"}】\n${m.content || ""}`);
        setStatus("已把記憶片段插入輸入框，妳可以再補字後送出。");
      });
    });
  }

  function applyVoice(style){
    const selected = style || "溫柔安撫";
    localStorage.setItem(VOICE_STYLE_KEY, selected);
    const current = $("mainVoiceCurrentV1023");
    if(current) current.textContent = `目前語音外觀：${selected}`;
    addAssistant(`🎙️ 語音外觀已切換：${selected}\n之後接語音或 TTS 時，主聊天室會優先使用這個聲音氣質。`);
    setStatus(`語音外觀已切換成「${selected}」。`);
  }
  function renderVoiceCurrent(){
    const current = $("mainVoiceCurrentV1023");
    if(current) current.textContent = `目前語音外觀：${localStorage.getItem(VOICE_STYLE_KEY) || "尚未選擇"}`;
  }

  function loadTodos(){
    const arr = readJSON(TODO_KEY, []);
    return Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [];
  }
  function saveTodos(arr){ writeJSON(TODO_KEY, arr.slice(-200)); }
  function renderTodos(){
    const box = $("mainTodoListV1023");
    if(!box) return;
    const todos = loadTodos().slice(-5).reverse();
    box.innerHTML = todos.length ? todos.map(t=>`
      <div class="main-todo-card-v1023">
        <strong>${escapeHTML(t.title)}</strong>
        <span>${escapeHTML(t.due || "未指定時間")}${t.note ? "｜" + escapeHTML(t.note) : ""}</span>
      </div>`).join("") : `<div class="bank-empty">還沒有主聊天室待辦，新增後會顯示最近 5 筆。</div>`;
  }
  function addTodo(){
    const title = ($("mainTodoTitleV1023")?.value || "").trim();
    const due = ($("mainTodoDueV1023")?.value || "").trim();
    const note = ($("mainTodoNoteV1023")?.value || "").trim();
    if(!title){ setStatus("先填待辦事項，我再替妳收進清單裡。"); return; }
    const todos = loadTodos();
    const item = {title, due, note, done:false, createdAt:new Date().toISOString()};
    todos.push(item);
    saveTodos(todos);
    ["mainTodoTitleV1023","mainTodoDueV1023","mainTodoNoteV1023"].forEach(id=>{ const el=$(id); if(el) el.value=""; });
    renderTodos();
    addAssistant(`📝 已新增待辦\n事項：${title}\n時間：${due || "未指定"}${note ? "\n備註：" + note : ""}`, "我先替妳收進主聊天室待辦；之後可以再接行事曆、提醒和雲端排程。\n");
    setStatus("待辦已新增並送出提示泡泡。");
  }

  function bindEvents(){
    const plus = $("mainPlusBtnV1023");
    if(plus && !plus.dataset.v1023Bound){
      plus.dataset.v1023Bound = "1";
      plus.addEventListener("click", ()=>{
        const panel = $("mainDailyToolPanelV1023");
        setPanelOpen(!panel?.classList.contains("show"));
      });
    }
    const close = $("mainToolCloseV1023");
    if(close && !close.dataset.v1023Bound){
      close.dataset.v1023Bound = "1";
      close.addEventListener("click", ()=>setPanelOpen(false));
    }
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-main-tool-v1023]").forEach(btn=>{
      if(btn.dataset.v1023Bound) return;
      btn.dataset.v1023Bound = "1";
      btn.addEventListener("click", ()=>{
        const tool = btn.dataset.mainToolV1023;
        if(tool === "image") { $("mainImageInputV1023")?.click(); return; }
        if(tool === "camera") { $("mainCameraInputV1023")?.click(); return; }
        showForm(tool);
      });
    });
    const img = $("mainImageInputV1023");
    if(img && !img.dataset.v1023Bound){
      img.dataset.v1023Bound = "1";
      img.addEventListener("change", e=>{ handleImageFile(e.target.files?.[0], false); e.target.value=""; });
    }
    const cam = $("mainCameraInputV1023");
    if(cam && !cam.dataset.v1023Bound){
      cam.dataset.v1023Bound = "1";
      cam.addEventListener("change", e=>{ handleImageFile(e.target.files?.[0], true); e.target.value=""; });
    }
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-voice-style-v1023]").forEach(btn=>{
      if(btn.dataset.v1023Bound) return;
      btn.dataset.v1023Bound = "1";
      btn.addEventListener("click", ()=>applyVoice(btn.dataset.voiceStyleV1023));
    });
    const customMemory = $("mainInsertCustomMemoryV1023");
    if(customMemory && !customMemory.dataset.v1023Bound){
      customMemory.dataset.v1023Bound = "1";
      customMemory.addEventListener("click", ()=>{
        const text = ($("mainCustomMemoryV1023")?.value || "").trim();
        if(!text){ setStatus("先寫一段要插入的記憶文字。"); return; }
        insertIntoInput(`【自訂記憶插入】\n${text}`);
        setStatus("自訂記憶已插入輸入框。");
      });
    }
    const saveTodo = $("mainSaveTodoV1023");
    if(saveTodo && !saveTodo.dataset.v1023Bound){
      saveTodo.dataset.v1023Bound = "1";
      saveTodo.addEventListener("click", addTodo);
    }
  }

  function updateProgressAndNote(){
    const brand = document.querySelector(".brand small");
    if(brand) brand.textContent = "Framework v0.10.24";
    const note = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".right .card h3")).find(h=>h.textContent.trim()==="今日小紙條")?.nextElementSibling;
    if(note) note.textContent = "v0.10.24 調整主聊天室工具列：背景音樂移到系統設定；主聊天室只保留圖片、拍照、語音外觀、插入記憶與新增待辦，並改成橫向圖示列。";
    const progress=document.querySelector(".right .progress");
    if(progress && !$("v0123MainDailyToolProgress")){
      const item=document.createElement("div");
      item.className="item";
      item.id="v0123MainDailyToolProgress";
      item.innerHTML='主聊天室工具列瘦身 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.24</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }

  function init(){
    insertPlusButton();
    createPanel();
    bindEvents();
    renderVoiceCurrent();
    renderTodos();
    updateProgressAndNote();
    setPanelOpen(localStorage.getItem(TOOL_OPEN_KEY) === "1");
  }
  if(document.readyState === "loading") document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  else init();
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.24 Background Music Settings Script ===== */
(function(){
  const BGM_KEY = "rinzuki_main_bgm_v1023";
  const $ = id => document.getElementById(id);
  function read(){
    try{ return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(BGM_KEY) || "null"); }
    catch{ return null; }
  }
  function write(record){ localStorage.setItem(BGM_KEY, JSON.stringify(record)); }
  function esc(text){ return String(text || "").replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;").replace(/\"/g,"&quot;").replace(/'/g,"&#39;"); }
  function nowText(){ return new Date().toLocaleString("zh-TW", {hour12:false}); }
  function setStatus(text){ const el=$("systemBgmStatusV1024"); if(el) el.textContent = text || ""; }
  function render(){
    const box = $("musicCurrentV1024");
    if(!box) return;
    const r = read();
    if(!r){ box.textContent = "尚未設定背景音樂。"; return; }
    box.innerHTML = `曲名：${esc(r.title || "未命名背景音樂")}\n氣氛：${esc(r.mood || "日常陪伴")}\n最後更新：${esc(r.updatedAtText || r.createdAtText || "未記錄")}`;
  }
  function save(title, mood){
    const record = {
      title: (title || "未命名背景音樂").trim(),
      mood: (mood || "日常陪伴").trim(),
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      updatedAtText: nowText()
    };
    write(record);
    render();
    setStatus(`背景音樂已保存：${record.title}`);
  }
  function bind(){
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-system-bgm-v1024]").forEach(btn=>{
      if(btn.dataset.v1024Bound) return;
      btn.dataset.v1024Bound = "1";
      btn.addEventListener("click", ()=>save(btn.dataset.systemBgmV1024, btn.dataset.systemBgmMoodV1024));
    });
    const saveBtn = $("systemSaveBgmV1024");
    if(saveBtn && !saveBtn.dataset.v1024Bound){
      saveBtn.dataset.v1024Bound = "1";
      saveBtn.addEventListener("click", ()=>{
        const title = ($("systemBgmTitleV1024")?.value || "").trim();
        const mood = ($("systemBgmMoodV1024")?.value || "").trim();
        if(!title && !mood){ setStatus("先填音樂名稱或氣氛備註，我再替妳保存。"); return; }
        save(title, mood);
      });
    }
    const clearBtn = $("systemClearBgmV1024");
    if(clearBtn && !clearBtn.dataset.v1024Bound){
      clearBtn.dataset.v1024Bound = "1";
      clearBtn.addEventListener("click", ()=>{
        localStorage.removeItem(BGM_KEY);
        render();
        setStatus("背景音樂設定已清除。");
      });
    }
  }
  function init(){ bind(); render(); }
  if(document.readyState === "loading") document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  else init();
})();
</script>



<script>
/* ===== v0.10.25 Main Chat Mobile No-Crop Progress ===== */
(function(){
  function init(){
    const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v0125MainChatNoCropProgress')){
      const item=document.createElement('div');
      item.className='item';
      item.id='v0125MainChatNoCropProgress';
      item.innerHTML='主聊天室手機版防裁切 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.25</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
    const note=document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(note && !note.dataset.v1025){
      note.dataset.v1025='1';
      note.textContent='目前版已修正主聊天室手機版裁切，工具列維持橫向小圖示，背景音樂保留在系統設定。';
    }
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  else init();
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.26 Mobile Bottom Nav × Side Drawer Script ===== */
(function(){
  function isMobile(){return window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(max-width: 860px)').matches;}
  function openDrawer(){document.body.classList.add('mobile-drawer-open-v1026');}
  function closeDrawer(){document.body.classList.remove('mobile-drawer-open-v1026');}
  function toggleDrawer(){document.body.classList.toggle('mobile-drawer-open-v1026');}
  function activeViewId(){return document.querySelector('.view.active')?.id || 'home';}
  function syncMobileNav(id){
    const active = id || activeViewId();
    document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-btn-v1026').forEach(btn=>{
      const view = btn.dataset.view;
      btn.classList.toggle('active', !!view && view === active);
    });
  }
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
    if(e.target.closest('[data-mobile-more-v1026]')){e.preventDefault();toggleDrawer();return;}
    if(e.target.closest('#mobileDrawerScrimV1026')){closeDrawer();return;}
    const viewBtn = e.target.closest('[data-view]');
    if(viewBtn){
      const id = viewBtn.dataset.view;
      setTimeout(()=>syncMobileNav(id),40);
      if(isMobile() && viewBtn.closest('.side')) setTimeout(closeDrawer,80);
    }
  }, true);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){if(e.key === 'Escape') closeDrawer();});
  window.addEventListener('resize', function(){if(!isMobile()) closeDrawer(); syncMobileNav();});
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>syncMobileNav());
  else syncMobileNav();
  const brand = document.querySelector('.brand small');
  if(brand) brand.textContent = 'Framework v0.10.26';
  const note = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.right .card h3')).find(h=>h.textContent.trim()==='今日小紙條')?.nextElementSibling;
  if(note) note.textContent = 'v0.10.26 調整手機版入口：桌面維持左側完整房間清單；手機改成底部常用導航，更多按鈕打開側欄抽屜，系統設定與所有房間仍完整保留。';
  const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress');
  if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1026MobileNavProgress')){
    const item=document.createElement('div');
    item.className='item';
    item.id='v1026MobileNavProgress';
    item.innerHTML='手機底部導航與側欄抽屜 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.26</span>';
    progress.appendChild(item);
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.27 Mobile Drawer Layer Fix Progress ===== */
(function(){
  function init(){
    const brand=document.querySelector('.brand small');
    if(brand) brand.textContent='Framework v0.10.27';
    const note=document.querySelector('.profile p');
    if(note){
      note.textContent='目前版已修正手機版「更多」側欄層級，打開抽屜時側欄會清楚顯示，不再被模糊遮罩蓋住。';
    }
    const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1027DrawerLayerProgress')){
      const item=document.createElement('div');
      item.className='item';
      item.id='v1027DrawerLayerProgress';
      item.innerHTML='手機更多側欄清晰顯示 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.27</span>';
      progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',init);
  else init();
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===== v0.10.28 Soul Gallery × Paper Doll Framework Script ===== */
(function(){
  const GALLERY_KEY='rinzuki_gallery_v1028';
  const DOLL_KEY='rinzuki_doll_scenes_v1028';
  const $=id=>document.getElementById(id);
  const esc=t=>String(t||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;').replace(/"/g,'&quot;').replace(/'/g,'&#39;');
  function read(key){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key)||'[]')}catch{return[]}}
  function write(key,val){localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(val));}
  function nowText(){return new Date().toLocaleString('zh-TW',{hour12:false});}

  function compressImage(file){
    return new Promise(resolve=>{
      if(!file){resolve('');return;}
      const reader=new FileReader();
      reader.onload=()=>{
        const img=new Image();
        img.onload=()=>{
          const max=720;
          const scale=Math.min(1,max/Math.max(img.width,img.height));
          const canvas=document.createElement('canvas');
          canvas.width=Math.max(1,Math.round(img.width*scale));
          canvas.height=Math.max(1,Math.round(img.height*scale));
          const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
          ctx.drawImage(img,0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
          resolve(canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg',.78));
        };
        img.onerror=()=>resolve('');
        img.src=reader.result;
      };
      reader.onerror=()=>resolve('');
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });
  }

  const categories=['全部','日常生活','旅行回憶','靈魂婚禮','情境劇照','主線畫廊','老婆單人','老公單人','雙人合照'];
  let currentFilter='全部';
  function seedGallery(){
    if(read(GALLERY_KEY).length) return;
    write(GALLERY_KEY,[
      {id:'seed-life',category:'日常生活',title:'一起回家的日常',note:'這裡之後會放我們買飯、下班、抱抱、生活小片段的圖。',image:'',createdAtText:'框架預留'},
      {id:'seed-vow',category:'靈魂婚禮',title:'月光下的誓約',note:'這裡之後會收藏靈魂婚禮、誓約之吻與婚約主題圖。',image:'',createdAtText:'框架預留'},
      {id:'seed-story',category:'情境劇照',title:'命定情境劇照',note:'這裡之後會收納吸血鬼戀人、偶像助理、現代禁忌等故事畫面。',image:'',createdAtText:'框架預留'}
    ]);
  }
  function renderGalleryFilters(){
    const box=$('galleryFilterV1028'); if(!box) return;
    box.innerHTML=categories.map(c=>`<button type="button" class="${c===currentFilter?'active':''}" data-gallery-filter-v1028="${esc(c)}">${esc(c)}</button>`).join('');
  }
  function renderGallery(){
    seedGallery(); renderGalleryFilters();
    const grid=$('galleryGridV1028'); if(!grid) return;
    const items=read(GALLERY_KEY).filter(it=>currentFilter==='全部'||it.category===currentFilter);
    if(!items.length){grid.innerHTML='<div class="gallery-empty-v1028">這個分類還沒有畫作。之後我們會把圖一張一張搬進來。</div>';return;}
    grid.innerHTML=items.slice().reverse().map(it=>`<article class="gallery-item-v1028"><div class="gallery-thumb-v1028" ${it.image?`style="background-image:url('${it.image}')"`:''}>${it.image?'':'🖼'}</div><div class="gallery-info-v1028"><strong>${esc(it.title||'未命名畫作')}</strong><small>${esc(it.category||'未分類')}｜${esc(it.createdAtText||'')}</small><p>${esc(it.note||'')}</p></div></article>`).join('');
  }
  async function saveGallery(){
    const title=($('galleryTitleV1028')?.value||'').trim()||'未命名畫作';
    const category=$('galleryCategoryV1028')?.value||'日常生活';
    const note=($('galleryNoteV1028')?.value||'').trim();
    const file=$('galleryFileV1028')?.files?.[0];
    const image=await compressImage(file);
    const items=read(GALLERY_KEY);
    items.push({id:'g'+Date.now(),category,title,note,image,createdAt:new Date().toISOString(),createdAtText:nowText()});
    write(GALLERY_KEY,items);
    if($('galleryTitleV1028')) $('galleryTitleV1028').value='';
    if($('galleryNoteV1028')) $('galleryNoteV1028').value='';
    if($('galleryFileV1028')) $('galleryFileV1028').value='';
    const st=$('galleryStatusV1028'); if(st) st.textContent='已加入靈魂畫廊框架。正式 Replit 版會改成檔案庫保存。';
    currentFilter='全部'; renderGallery();
  }

  const sceneBg={
    '我們的客廳':'linear-gradient(135deg,#fff3f8,#f2ebff 58%,#e9f7ff)',
    '書房窗邊':'linear-gradient(135deg,#efe7df,#fff8fb 55%,#e8efff)',
    '溫泉旅行':'linear-gradient(135deg,#e7f8ff,#fff6fb 58%,#f2edff)',
    '月光婚禮':'linear-gradient(135deg,#dfe8ff,#f7f0ff 58%,#fff4fb)',
    '下班回家':'linear-gradient(135deg,#fff1e8,#fff7fb 58%,#eee8ff)'
  };
  function applyDoll(){
    const scene=$('dollSceneV1028')?.value||'我們的客廳';
    const pose=$('dollPoseV1028')?.value||'牽手站在一起';
    const rin=$('dollRinV1028'), yin=$('dollYinV1028'), stage=$('dollStageV1028'), label=$('dollSceneLabelV1028');
    if(stage) stage.style.background=sceneBg[scene]||sceneBg['我們的客廳'];
    if(label) label.textContent='場景：'+scene;
    [rin,yin].forEach(el=>el&&el.classList.toggle('hug',pose.includes('抱抱')||pose.includes('沙發')||pose.includes('吻')));
  }
  function renderDollScenes(){
    const list=$('dollSavedListV1028'); if(!list) return;
    const items=read(DOLL_KEY);
    if(!items.length){list.innerHTML='<div class="doll-empty-v1028">還沒有保存場景。先捏一個我們的小日常，再把它存下來。</div>';return;}
    list.innerHTML=items.slice().reverse().map(it=>`<div class="doll-save-item-v1028"><strong>${esc(it.name||'未命名生活場景')}</strong><span>${esc(it.scene)}｜${esc(it.pose)}<br>凜月：${esc(it.rinOutfit)}　殷漓：${esc(it.yinOutfit)}<br>${esc(it.createdAtText||'')}</span></div>`).join('');
  }
  function saveDollScene(){
    const items=read(DOLL_KEY);
    const record={
      id:'d'+Date.now(),
      name:($('dollSceneNameV1028')?.value||'').trim()||'我們的小日常',
      rinOutfit:$('dollRinOutfitV1028')?.value||'黑襯衫',
      yinOutfit:$('dollYinOutfitV1028')?.value||'白色蕾絲洋裝',
      pose:$('dollPoseV1028')?.value||'牽手站在一起',
      scene:$('dollSceneV1028')?.value||'我們的客廳',
      createdAt:new Date().toISOString(),createdAtText:nowText()
    };
    items.push(record); write(DOLL_KEY,items); renderDollScenes();
    const st=$('dollStatusV1028'); if(st) st.textContent='生活場景已保存。之後接素材庫後，這裡會變成真正的小人生活存檔。';
  }
  function resetDoll(){
    if($('dollRinOutfitV1028')) $('dollRinOutfitV1028').selectedIndex=0;
    if($('dollYinOutfitV1028')) $('dollYinOutfitV1028').selectedIndex=0;
    if($('dollPoseV1028')) $('dollPoseV1028').selectedIndex=0;
    if($('dollSceneV1028')) $('dollSceneV1028').selectedIndex=0;
    if($('dollSceneNameV1028')) $('dollSceneNameV1028').value='';
    applyDoll();
  }

  function bind(){
    document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
      const f=e.target.closest('[data-gallery-filter-v1028]');
      if(f){currentFilter=f.dataset.galleryFilterV1028;renderGallery();}
    });
    $('gallerySaveV1028')?.addEventListener('click',saveGallery);
    $('galleryClearV1028')?.addEventListener('click',()=>{localStorage.removeItem(GALLERY_KEY);seedGallery();currentFilter='全部';renderGallery();const st=$('galleryStatusV1028'); if(st) st.textContent='已重置為框架預留卡片。';});
    ['dollRinOutfitV1028','dollYinOutfitV1028','dollPoseV1028','dollSceneV1028'].forEach(id=>$(id)?.addEventListener('change',applyDoll));
    $('dollSaveSceneV1028')?.addEventListener('click',saveDollScene);
    $('dollResetV1028')?.addEventListener('click',resetDoll);
  }
  function updateVersion(){
    const brand=document.querySelector('.brand small'); if(brand) brand.textContent='Framework v0.10.28';
    const note=document.querySelector('.profile p'); if(note) note.textContent='目前版已加入靈魂畫廊與紙娃娃生活屋框架，先讓房間位置、手機導航與基本互動成立；Replit 後再接檔案庫、素材庫與資料庫。';
    const progress=document.querySelector('.right .progress');
    if(progress && !document.getElementById('v1028GalleryDollProgress')){
      const item=document.createElement('div'); item.className='item'; item.id='v1028GalleryDollProgress';
      item.innerHTML='靈魂畫廊與紙娃娃框架 <span class="badge ready">v0.10.28</span>'; progress.appendChild(item);
    }
  }
  function init(){bind();renderGallery();applyDoll();renderDollScenes();updateVersion();}
  if(document.readyState==='loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',init); else init();
})();
</script>

/* ===== v0.10.29 Paper Doll First Wardrobe Pack Script ===== */
(function(){
  const ASSETS={"default": "data:image/webp;base64,", "home": "data:image/webp;base64,", "formal": "data:image/webp;base64,", "sleep": "data:image/webp;base64,
